name: How does workers comp work if I fell at work in West Valley City?
description: No-fault benefits for medical, wages via employer's insurance; report and file promptly in Utah.

mainEntity.name: How does workers comp work if I fell at work in West Valley City?

acceptedAnswer.text: No-fault benefits for medical, wages via employer's insurance; report and file promptly in Utah.
acceptedAnswer.description: Utah workers' compensation provides no-fault benefits for work-related injuries like slips and falls, paid by employer's insurance regardless of fault. Covers reasonable medical care, temporary total disability (TTD) at 66 2/3% of average weekly wage, and permanent impairment awards[1]. Key factors: Employer must carry coverage; file within 1 year but notify within 180 days; disputes go to administrative law judge. Report incident, get doctor approval for treatment, track all expenses. Avoid signing anything waiving rights without review.
